feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: There is a wrong when create a SAP Build Apps.
403 error while opening a SAP Build Apps project with my trial account
entry.content: I was working without problems on a project on my trial account, then one day I tried to log in and I get a 403 error. I can enter SAP Build Apps and see the list of projects, but when I click on the project name I get the error. I'm facing this problem from about a week now, so it is not a temporary problem. How can I solve it without losing all the work already done?

entry.title: Integration Odata V4 Service in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi All, I have created OData V4 Service using ABAP RAP.  I am trying to consume this OData Service in SAP Build Apps. But the catalog in Build Apps only listing OData V2 Services. I have also checked Business Application Studio. There all OData V2 and V4 Service are available. Is OData V4 service not supported in SAP Build Apps?

entry.title: Hi, I am not able to subscribe to SAP Build Apps using trial account. It gives failed error.
entry.content: It gives failed error, anyone got luck with loading it successfully?

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 And SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Spoiler
 

Can anyone help me understand how to connect SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 with SAP Build Apps? Also about some tips about SAP build apps shortcut..!!

Thank You  

yash:)

entry.title: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps.
entry.content: I can not subscribe to SAP Build Apps when I add it from service markketplace.

entry.title: Response Key Path is missing
entry.content: i want to pass that Relative Key Path("data") in new UI

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Integration of Google reCAPTCHA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I was wondering if it could be possible to integrate reCAPTCHA protection (v3) in SAP Build Apps applications. I tought about hosting an index.html to be able to use the script, but if you have another idea, please make a discussion about it. Do you think it is possible anyway?

Best regards,

Gergő

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Application Backend not working at all.
entry.content:
Hello,

I can't get any simple "hello wolrd" app to work.
When i create an simple SAP Build Application Backend, i get errors in the UI.
I get the same "Error Unable to fulfill proxy request" Error in the SAP Build Application.
And I can't create new records to a Entitiy Database.

Is the software curretly working at all ? I'm trying for days to get any App to work at all.
Deployment process also takes hours

 

Failed to load data.
unexpectedError Unable to fulfill proxy request

 

Error Unable to fulfill proxy requestCan't create new records to the Database.Same error in SAP Build Application

entry.title: Feature Request: Flow Function for Opening Apple Subscription Screen
entry.content:
Hi SAP Build App - Community Team,

My name is Denis, and I have been building my application on SAP Build App for the past four years. I’ve witnessed incredible improvements since the transition from AppGyver to SAP, and I couldn’t be happier with the platform.

Many friends and colleagues doubted my decision to base my entire development on a low-code platform, warning me that I might regret it. However, SAP Build App and I proved them wrong—I’ve built my solution entirely on this platform.

Currently, there is only one roadblock preventing me from launching my project: Apple requires me to use their subscription system and open the Apple Subscription Management screen, using stripe for Android/Web.

I have spent the past four weeks searching for a solution—combing through forums, documentation, and Stack Overflow. I even hired iOS developers to help me, but no solution emerged.

My question is: Is there any chance that SAP Build App could introduce a flow function to open the Apple Subscription Management screen?
Reference: Apple Developer Documentation

I believe this feature would be a valuable addition to SAP Build App, helping to dispel the misconception that low-code platforms are only suitable for prototypes. It would empower creators like me to launch production-ready applications that meet platform-specific requirements.

Thank you so much for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
Denis

@Dan_Wroblewski 

@ajmaradiaga 

@beapasch

entry.title: Issue with Preview on Device Progress in SAP Build Learning Path
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working through the SAP Build learning path, and I have successfully completed the "Preview on Device" step as instructed. However, my learning status remains at 80%, and this step is not marked as completed.

Since the next tasks are locked until this step is recognized as done, I am unable to proceed further. I have tried repeating the process multiple times, but the issue persists.

Has anyone else experienced this problem? Is there a way to manually mark the step as completed or refresh the progress?

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

Best regards, Mazen

SAP Build

entry.title: Build APP build Issue
entry.content:
Please help.
I am facing an issue while building Android App (Client run time version - 4.12.192). The error message is as follows:
AB version: 3.11.0
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - how to hide page name during preview
entry.content:
Hi, 
Anyone can help me on how to hide page name when preview? 
I can't remove the page name in properties because it's hard for me to differentiate it during development. 



Thanks!

entry.title: sap BTP BUILD Apps no authorization for ABAP System
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

In BTP cloud i have created destination for ABAP and connection is success and reachable .

The issue is from BUILD App , when trying to access the ABAP system via the destination created in BTP Cockpit we are getting below error .

Error message :  "You don't have permission to access this system. Choose another system or reach out to your admin."

Please suggest solution . 

 

Error Image:

Destination Detail

entry.title: "Object with ID LSC00106 not found" error while doing Developing Apps with SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Dear community, I am getting the following error "Object with ID LSC00106 not found" while doing doing Developing Apps with SAP Build Apps using Drag-and-Drop Simplicity course https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-apps-with-sap-build-apps-using-drag-and-drop-simplicity/. I cannot track my study progress when logged because of this error. Did anyone encountered any similar situation? I deleted browsing history including cache but it does not help. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps How to call Odata resource with Expand
entry.content:
Hi  ,

I need a help in SAP Build App to get and display data from the SAP Odata v2 services 

SAP Gateway OData Query:

/ZGSP_INSPECTION_OPERATION_SRV/INSPOPER_GETDETAILSet(Inspoper='0010',Insplot='045000001552')?$expand=GetCharResults&$format=json

Connected odata services ZGSP_INSPECTION_OPERATION_SRV with BTP Destination 

How to call below query to get and display data in list view?

call ZGSP_INSPECTION_OPERATION_SRV/INSPOPER_GETDETAILSet(Inspoper='0010',Insplot='045000001552')?$expand=GetCharResults&$format=json

entry.title: Error in SAP Build apps Build service 4.12.212
entry.content:
I'm trying to build an app. Web build.
It's an old app imported from Appgyver. I did some builds a year ago. Everything worked. But now i need some updates and i can't build. I need help! Thankyou!

Getting the error below at 92%.

AB version: 3.15.0
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

entry.title: Preview the remote file content from the integrated SAP system
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am designing an application integrating SAP Build Apps to another SAP system using OData service. I want to fetch the attachment information from a sub-entity - Attachment (Root/Attachment) and open it in the new pop up browser window as attachment preview, no allowing the direct file download.
When I use 'Download Base64 text as file (web only)' logic flow, the attachment is directly downloaded with the Component tap event.
All I want is, to allow only opening of the file from integrated system which will provide me - Binary file Content, file name and mime type.

BR,
Chandan

entry.title: UI for SAP Build Apps / Apps Editor looks different
entry.content: Hi, I was trying to follow the tutorial on creating an App using SAP Build Apps editor. I noticed that the user interface to create the REST API Integration looks different between the Trial BTP platform and the one on the tutorial. I was not able to complete the exercise after creating the Data configuration.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Data entity already exists error
entry.content:
I’m facing an error when creating a Data entity for the imported SAP Build Apps project.

Original project is created in the different BTP account. This resulted Data entity does not appear in the Integrations page.

Below steps are attempted to fix the error, but it shows the same error.

  1. Integrations are Uninstalled from Integrations page and added new API Integration. Integration is added successfully.
  2. Enabling required Data entity shows error.
  3. But, other Data entity is enabled without error within same API

Error: Data entity with the same name already exists. You can not add this entity unless you remove that existing resource.
